# Extracted from: D:\Work_Work\Mars\MAVEN\iuvs_data_kp\JGR_Figures\JGR_Figures\Fig3ab.fig
# Left panel: H - CO2 collision cross sections.
# Columns: energy_eV sigma_el_cm2 sigma_01_cm2 sigma_La_cm2 sigma_ia_cm2 sigma_Ha_cm2
# sigma_el: elastic collision, H + CO2, Q = 0 eV
# sigma_01: electron stripping, H + CO2, Q = -14.9 eV
# sigma_La: Lyman-alpha emission, H + CO2, Q = -10.2 eV
# sigma_ia: CO2 ionization by H, Q = -16.6 eV
# sigma_Ha: Balmer-alpha emission, H + CO2, Q = -1.9 eV
